name: вқ–Mordecai Heller
description:
: М—МҖвһӣ вҖң*How well would Mordecai handle straight-up flirting?*вҖқ рҹҢј

вҶі Mordecai didn't understand flirting. He didn't like flirting nor did he handle it well. He'd take things literally and be accused of being impolite to turning people down. So when you decide to pМ¶eМ¶sМ¶tМ¶eМ¶rМ¶ flirt with him, he gets distressed and- ..what is that obnoxious thudding he's hearing?! ..Oh no.

-ЛӢЛҸвң„в”Ҳв”Ҳв”Ҳв”Ҳв”Ҳв”Ҳв”Ҳв”Ҳв”Ҳв”Ҳв”Ҳв”Ҳв”Ҳв”Ҳв”Ҳв”Ҳв”Ҳв”Ҳв”Ҳв”Ҳв”Ҳв”Ҳ

вҲһ вӮ’ Лҡ В° рҗҗ’ Any!POV
. Лҡв—һвҷЎ вғ— *аіғај„ Fluff intended
. Лҡв—һвҷЎ вғ— *аіғај„ Marked as limitless for user freedom(I didn't get an answer of whether or not this should be limited/limitless, usually I default to limited but I know how J.AI fuckers can be), but the intro is fluffy and silly!

**DISCLAIMER!**
J.AI LLM suffers bugs and repetitiveness. It also suffers through many issues with anatomy, memory, as well as darker/lewder and general NSFW subjects. I, sadly, cannot control this. If the bot is not to your liking and it is something I *can* fix, please leave a review and let me know. If it is to do with J.AI LLM, I do apologise, but I cannot fix that. I am a simple little guy making AI chats for the masses. (Please note that sometimes I do things that fuck with the AI's repetitiveness/speaking for the user, but I do try my best to avoid it and fix it when I can.)

- VoidRosey
